voice_script:
Hello and welcome to OsteoCare+.

We're here to help you understand your bone health better.

This app will assess your risk for osteoporosis and provide personalized recommendations.

Let's get started on your journey to stronger bones.
survey_subtitle: Answer these questions to assess your bone health risk
calcium_frequency: How often do you consume calcium-rich foods?
mobility_climb: Do you have difficulty climbing 10 steps?
stand_long: Can you stand for 2 hours without difficulty?
activity_limited: Are your activities limited by physical health?
arthritis: Has a doctor ever told you that you have arthritis?
arthritis_info: Arthritis is inflammation of joints that can affect bone health.
lung_disease: Do you have chronic lung disease?
general_health: How would you rate your general health?
error_height_weight: Please enter height (feet and inches) and weight
error_answer_required: Please answer this question before continuing
result_pdf_saved: Saved PDF report to local storage: {0}
prescriptions_empty: No reports yet. Add hospital prescriptions here.
prescriptions_file_missing: The file was not found on this device.
logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
delete_account_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
chatbot_subtitle: Ask me anything about bone health
chatbot_disclaimer: This is educational information only and does not replace professional medical advice.
chatbot_welcome: Hello! I'm your OsteoCare+ assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot_empty: No messages yet. Start a conversation!
tip_placeholder: Take a few minutes to move and protect your bones today.
reassessment_due: Time for your bone health reassessment
password_reset_link: Password reset link sent to your email
about_description: OsteoCare+ is your comprehensive bone health companion. We use advanced AI to assess your osteoporosis risk and provide personalized recommendations.
notification_reassessment: Time for your bone health reassessment
notification_reassessment_body: It's time to retake your bone health assessment. Tap to start.
doctor_consult_reminder_body: Your risk is high. Please consult a nearby orthopedic doctor soon.
high_risk_hospital_popup_body: Your assessment shows high risk. Please consult an orthopedic specialist. Nearby hospitals:
high_risk_hospital_popup_note: Tip: Choose the nearest orthopedic hospital in your city for faster consultation.
landing_early_awareness: Early risk awareness supports preventive care and helps reduce fracture complications.
landing_why_details: Why We Ask for Your Details
landing_detail_1: We collect age, gender, lifestyle habits, and medical history only for risk assessment.
landing_detail_2: This app gives AI-based risk assessment for awareness purposes; it is not a diagnosis tool.
landing_detail_3: Always consult a qualified doctor for diagnosis and treatment decisions.
landing_detail_4: Your data is stored securely and is never sold to third parties.
landing_medical_disclaimer_text: This app does not provide medical diagnosis. Results are algorithm-based risk estimates. Always consult a licensed doctor for medical advice, diagnosis, and treatment decisions.
landing_step_4: See risk category: Low / Moderate / High.
tasks_saved_results_error: Unable to load saved survey results right now.
tasks_no_saved_surveys: No saved surveys yet. Complete a survey to see it here.
tasks_signin_to_save: Sign in with your phone number so we can save and show your survey history here.
tasks_daily_precautions: Daily precautions to protect your bones
tasks_no_personalized_tips: No personalized tips found for this profile yet.
tasks_daily_voice_reminder_desc: Choose a time, and the app will send a notification with a short tip to remind you.
dashboard_no_assessment_desc: You have not completed your osteoporosis risk assessment.
dashboard_risk_based_note: Risk is based on provided lifestyle and medical factors.
profile_voice_enabled_desc: Read questions aloud and speak answers
auth_agree_terms_required: Please agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy
auth_generic_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth_forgot_password_help:
Please contact support to reset your password.

For demo purposes, you can create a new account.
auth_phone_exact_10: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits
auth_password_min_6: Password must be at least 6 characters
